description: Pay for x402 paywalls, datasets, and store checkouts on Solana, behind hard spending caps.
name: com.solinkify/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Path to the agent's Solana JSON keypair (solana-keygen new -o agent-keypair.json)
environmentVariables.name: SOLINKIFY_WALLET_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Hard cap for a single payment in USD (default 1)
environmentVariables.name: SOLINKIFY_MAX_PAYMENT_USD

environmentVariables.description: Hard cap for total spend per UTC day in USD (default 10)
environmentVariables.name: SOLINKIFY_DAILY_CAP_USD

environmentVariables.description: Custom Solana RPC endpoint (defaults to the network's public RPC)
environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL
